childcare_coverage.name: Childcare coverage
childcare_coverage.description: Share of children covered by formal childcare.

childcare_monthly_cost.name: Monthly childcare cost
childcare_monthly_cost.description: Typical monthly household cost of formal childcare.

students_per_teacher.name: Students per teacher
students_per_teacher.description: Average number of students for each teacher.

school_dropout_rate.name: School dropout rate
school_dropout_rate.description: Share of students leaving education without completion.

school_completion_rate.name: School completion rate
school_completion_rate.description: Share of students completing the relevant school level.

bilingual_school_availability.name: Bilingual school availability
bilingual_school_availability.description: Availability of bilingual schools relative to the child population.

employment_rate.name: Employment rate
employment_rate.description: Share of the working-age population in employment.

unemployment_rate.name: Unemployment rate
unemployment_rate.description: Share of the labour force without work and seeking employment.

median_net_salary.name: Median net salary
median_net_salary.description: Median monthly salary after taxes and social contributions.

vacancy_rate.name: Job vacancy rate
vacancy_rate.description: Open positions relative to the number of jobs.

gender_employment_gap.name: Gender employment gap
gender_employment_gap.description: Difference in employment rates between women and men.

foreign_born_employment_gap.name: Foreign-born employment gap
foreign_born_employment_gap.description: Employment-rate gap between foreign-born and native-born residents.

discrimination_experience_rate.name: Reported discrimination experience
discrimination_experience_rate.description: Share reporting discrimination in a representative survey.

hate_crime_rate.name: Recorded hate crime
hate_crime_rate.description: Officially recorded hate crimes relative to population; descriptive only.

integration_services_density.name: Integration service availability
integration_services_density.description: Public integration services relative to population.

anti_discrimination_office_access.name: Access to anti-discrimination advice
anti_discrimination_office_access.description: Travel time to an anti-discrimination advice office.

median_cold_rent.name: Median base rent
median_cold_rent.description: Median monthly rent excluding heating and service costs per square metre.

rent_burden.name: Rent burden
rent_burden.description: Share of disposable household income spent on rent.

vacancy_rate_housing.name: Housing vacancy rate
vacancy_rate_housing.description: Share of dwellings that are vacant.

new_housing_completions.name: New housing completions
new_housing_completions.description: Newly completed homes relative to population.

overcrowding_rate.name: Overcrowding rate
overcrowding_rate.description: Share of people living in an overcrowded household.

life_expectancy.name: Life expectancy
life_expectancy.description: Expected years of life at birth.

hospital_beds_density.name: Hospital bed density
hospital_beds_density.description: Available hospital beds relative to population.

pharmacy_access_time.name: Pharmacy access time
pharmacy_access_time.description: Typical travel time to the nearest pharmacy.

preventable_mortality.name: Preventable mortality
preventable_mortality.description: Deaths considered preventable relative to population.

violent_crime_rate.name: Recorded violent crime
violent_crime_rate.description: Officially recorded violent offences relative to population.

property_crime_rate.name: Recorded property crime
property_crime_rate.description: Officially recorded property offences relative to population.

road_fatality_rate.name: Road fatality rate
road_fatality_rate.description: Deaths in road traffic relative to population.

fire_service_response_time.name: Fire service response time
fire_service_response_time.description: Typical time for the fire service to reach an incident.

consumer_price_index.name: Consumer price level
consumer_price_index.description: Index of prices paid by households for goods and services.

electricity_household_price.name: Household electricity price
electricity_household_price.description: Price paid by households for one kilowatt-hour of electricity.

family_monthly_cost.name: Estimated family monthly cost
family_monthly_cost.description: Estimated monthly household expenditure for the specified family profile.

local_purchasing_power.name: Local purchasing power
local_purchasing_power.description: Disposable income relative to local prices.

public_transport_access.name: Public transport access
public_transport_access.description: Share of residents with convenient access to public transport.

average_commute_time.name: Average commute time
average_commute_time.description: Average duration of a one-way journey to work.

transit_service_frequency.name: Public transport frequency
transit_service_frequency.description: Scheduled public transport departures during a typical hour.

cycling_network_density.name: Cycling network density
cycling_network_density.description: Length of cycling infrastructure relative to urban area.

airport_access_time.name: Airport access time
airport_access_time.description: Typical travel time to a commercial airport.

pm25_annual_mean.name: Fine-particle air pollution
pm25_annual_mean.description: Annual mean concentration of PM2.5 particles.

green_space_access.name: Access to green space
green_space_access.description: Share of residents within convenient reach of public green space.

recycling_rate.name: Recycling rate
recycling_rate.description: Share of municipal waste prepared for reuse or recycling.

noise_exposure.name: Harmful noise exposure
noise_exposure.description: Share of residents exposed to harmful environmental noise.

heat_risk_days.name: High-heat risk days
heat_risk_days.description: Number of days per year exceeding the defined heat-risk threshold.

annual_sunshine_hours.name: Annual sunshine
annual_sunshine_hours.description: Recorded hours of sunshine in a typical year.

flood_risk_population.name: Population exposed to flood risk
flood_risk_population.description: Share of residents living in mapped flood-risk areas.

broadband_coverage.name: Broadband coverage
broadband_coverage.description: Share of households covered by qualifying fixed broadband.

gigabit_coverage.name: Gigabit network coverage
gigabit_coverage.description: Share of households covered by gigabit-capable networks.

business_registration_time.name: Business registration time
business_registration_time.description: Typical time required to register a new business.

business_startup_rate.name: Business startup rate
business_startup_rate.description: New business registrations relative to the working-age population.
